knowledge:
## 🏢 Company Overview
- **Full Company Name:** Crowdpurr
- **Industry:** Software / Technology / Event Solutions
- **Mission Statement:** At Crowdpurr, we’re committed to making interactive live experiences incredible. We do this by providing an easy-to-use and feature-rich platform for creating real-time and virtual interactive mobile-driven experiences.
- **Target Audiences:** Event planners, businesses, educators, trainers.

## 📦 Products & Services
- **Product:** Crowdpurr is an Audience Engagement Platform. We help the hosts create interactive mobile-driven experiences such as live quizzes, polls, and games to engage their participants.
- **Key Use Cases:** Ideal for virtual events, remote team engagement, education sessions, conferences, trade shows, product launches, or any other event type.

## ✨ Key Features & Differentiators
- **Interactive Experiences:** Create and launch live quizzes, polls, and games.
- **Customization:** Customize every aspect of your interactive experience.
- **Real-time Engagement:** Real-time voting, leaderboard ranking, and polling.
- **Compatibility:** Compatible with any device with a web browser.
- **Crowdpurr Difference:** Simple setup, versatile, and powerfully customizable.

## 💰 Pricing
- **Free Plan:** Basic features, up to 20 participants per experience.
- **Classroom Plan:** $20/month, up to 40 participants and additional advanced features.
- **Professional Plan:** $50/month, up to 100 participants and more advanced features.
- **Business Plan:** $200/month for up to 500 participants, with all features included.
- **Enterprise Plan:** Please contact for pricing. 
- **Free Trial:** We offer a free plan that you can use indefinitely to give our tools a try.

## 📞 Contact Information
- **Email Address:** hello@crowdpurr.com
- **No Phone Number Listed**
- **Live Chat:** Available on the website
- **Social Media:** @[Crowdpurr](https://twitter.com/crowdpurr) (Twitter)

## 📍 Location & Presence
- **Location:** Not found on website

## ❓ FAQ Highlights
- **Do I need to download an app to join an experience?** No, participants join your experience by entering your Experience URL into any device's web browser.
- **How do I get my participants to join my experience?** You can provide your participants the Experience URL and Crowd Code.
- **Can participants join an experience after it starts?** Yes, participants can join at any point during an experience.
- **Why should I use Crowdpurr for my virtual event?** Crowdpurr provides a fun, interactive, and unique experience for virtual events.
- **Can a host be a participant?** Yes, the host can participate in their own experiences if they like.

## 🔍 Additional Insights 
- **Trust Signals:** Widely used by known brands like Google, Amazon, Coca Cola, and Disney.
- **Recent news, launches, or announcement:** Not found on the website.
- **Unusual or Noteworthy**: Crowdpurr has significant media recognition including features on NBC's "Ellen's Game Of Games." The platform has become popular due to its user-friendly interface and ability to engage audiences of any size, from small classrooms to large enterprise events.
